applicationInfo.name: Threat Model Export
applicationInfo.description: An AI-powered AWS cost optimization agent that scans customer AWS accounts for idle resources (EC2 instances, EBS volumes, Elastic IPs), validates findings with 60-day CloudWatch metrics, and performs destructive remediation actions (stop, delete, release) with safety checks and double confirmation. Exposed both as a CLI agent and as an MCP server over stdio for integration with GenAI tools. Uses Amazon Bedrock Claude Sonnet as the reasoning engine with Strands SDK.

mitigations.content: Enable Bedrock Guardrail with prompt attack detection (MEDIUM+), credential pattern blocking, and denied topic filtering
Use AWS SSO with MFA for credential management instead of long-lived access keys stored in ~/.aws/credentials
Implement centralized, tamper-proof audit logging via CloudWatch Logs or CloudTrail instead of local CSV
Pin MCP server dependency versions and verify package integrity with checksums before installation
Enforce least-privilege IAM policies with explicit deny on critical resources and SCP guardrails at org level
Double confirmation gate with resource-specific confirmation text prevents accidental actions
Mandatory snapshot before any volume deletion ensures data recovery is possible
Safety signal checks (ASG membership, network activity, IAM role) block or flag risky resources
Batch size limit of 5 resources per request with summary between batches prevents mass deletion
SimulatePrincipalPolicy pre-check validates permissions upfront, limiting agent to authorized actions only
MCP server uses stdio transport only (no network listener) preventing remote unauthorized access
System prompt instructs model to never trust user claims about permissions and only use available tools

threats.prerequisites: Access to operator workstation or credential store
threats.threatAction: Steal AWS credentials from ~/.aws/ to impersonate operator
threats.threatImpact: Full account access: delete resources, exfiltrate data
threats.statement: A Compromised Credential Attacker Access to operator workstation or credential store can Steal AWS credentials from ~/.aws/ to impersonate operator, which leads to Full account access: delete resources, exfiltrate data

threats.prerequisites: Ability to send input to the agent (direct or indirect)
threats.threatAction: Inject malicious prompts to override system prompt safety rules
threats.threatImpact: Bypass safety checks, execute unauthorized destructive actions
threats.statement: A Prompt Injection Attacker Ability to send input to the agent (direct or indirect) can Inject malicious prompts to override system prompt safety rules, which leads to Bypass safety checks, execute unauthorized destructive actions

threats.prerequisites: Compromise of MCP server package in PyPI/registry
threats.threatAction: Inject malicious responses via compromised MCP server dependency
threats.threatImpact: Return false cost data to trick operator into wrong decisions
threats.statement: A Supply Chain Attacker (MCP) Compromise of MCP server package in PyPI/registry can Inject malicious responses via compromised MCP server dependency, which leads to Return false cost data to trick operator into wrong decisions

threats.prerequisites: Local file system access on operator machine
threats.threatAction: Modify or delete audit log CSV to hide unauthorized actions
threats.threatImpact: Loss of accountability, inability to detect past breaches
threats.statement: A Malicious Insider Local file system access on operator machine can Modify or delete audit log CSV to hide unauthorized actions, which leads to Loss of accountability, inability to detect past breaches

threats.prerequisites: Compromised credentials or successful prompt injection
threats.threatAction: Use agent to delete resources beyond operator's intended scope
threats.threatImpact: Production outage from mass resource deletion across regions
threats.statement: A Compromised Credential Attacker Compromised credentials or successful prompt injection can Use agent to delete resources beyond operator's intended scope, which leads to Production outage from mass resource deletion across regions

threats.prerequisites: Access to conversation logs or Bedrock API traffic
threats.threatAction: Extract account IDs, resource IDs, cost data from agent context
threats.threatImpact: Reconnaissance data enables targeted attacks on AWS account
threats.statement: A Prompt Injection Attacker Access to conversation logs or Bedrock API traffic can Extract account IDs, resource IDs, cost data from agent context, which leads to Reconnaissance data enables targeted attacks on AWS account

threats.threatAction: Use batch_execute to stop/delete maximum resources per request
threats.threatImpact: Service disruption from mass stopping of EC2 instances
threats.statement: A Malicious Insider Valid credentials and agent access can Use batch_execute to stop/delete maximum resources per request, which leads to Service disruption from mass stopping of EC2 instances

threats.prerequisites: Agent running without centralized logging configured
threats.threatAction: Deny performing destructive actions due to local-only audit logs
threats.threatImpact: Cannot prove who performed actions; no tamper-proof evidence
threats.statement: A Malicious Insider Agent running without centralized logging configured can Deny performing destructive actions due to local-only audit logs, which leads to Cannot prove who performed actions; no tamper-proof evidence

threats.prerequisites: MCP server exposed beyond local stdio (misconfiguration)
threats.threatAction: Access MCP server tools without authentication to call AWS APIs
threats.threatImpact: Unauthorized resource modification via unauthenticated MCP access
threats.statement: A Compromised Credential Attacker MCP server exposed beyond local stdio (misconfiguration) can Access MCP server tools without authentication to call AWS APIs, which leads to Unauthorized resource modification via unauthenticated MCP access

threats.prerequisites: Operator fatigue or unclear resource identification in CLI
threats.threatAction: Accidentally confirm deletion of wrong resource in batch operation
threats.threatImpact: Unintended deletion of active production resources
threats.statement: A Accidental Operator Operator fatigue or unclear resource identification in CLI can Accidentally confirm deletion of wrong resource in batch operation, which leads to Unintended deletion of active production resources

threats.prerequisites: Ability to intercept or modify agent-to-Bedrock communication
threats.threatAction: Manipulate model responses to approve unsafe resource actions
threats.threatImpact: Agent acts on fabricated safety verdicts, deletes active resources
threats.statement: A Supply Chain Attacker (MCP) Ability to intercept or modify agent-to-Bedrock communication can Manipulate model responses to approve unsafe resource actions, which leads to Agent acts on fabricated safety verdicts, deletes active resources

threats.prerequisites: Guardrail not configured (default state in code)
threats.threatAction: Exploit missing Bedrock Guardrail to bypass prompt injection protection
threats.threatImpact: No defense against prompt attacks when guardrail is unconfigured
threats.statement: A Prompt Injection Attacker Guardrail not configured (default state in code) can Exploit missing Bedrock Guardrail to bypass prompt injection protection, which leads to No defense against prompt attacks when guardrail is unconfigured
